title: Generic classes should be defined using the type parameter syntax
description: This rule checks for generic classes not using the type parameter syntax.
message: Class should use type parameter syntax.
recommendation: Use type parameter syntax for generic classes.
why_is_this_an_issue: Using type parameter syntax makes the code easier to understand and maintain, as it emphasizes the types of the class's methods and attributes.
how_to_fix: Replace the generic class with a class that uses the type parameter syntax.

metadata.title: Generic classes should be defined using the type parameter syntax
